crime.value: Murder with DNA evidence and eyewitnesses placing defendant at scene
crime.quote: young man accused of murder. The Prosecutor for the State has eye witnesses that place the defendant at the crime scene

closed_world.value: Courtroom legal proceedings and investigation boundaries
closed_world.quote: At eight forty-five AM on a hot, July, Monday, Adam Bader st

culprit_and_motive.value: Pearl (defendant) who posed as his twin brother, motive unclear
culprit_and_motive.quote: all the information about you posing as your twin brother

resolution.value: Mistrial declared, case to be retried with new evidence about twin deception
resolution.quote: I managed to get a mistrial. That means a tie so to speak. The prosecutor has already informed me that he's going to trial again

investigator.value: Adam Bader, public defender lawyer defending the accused
investigator.quote: Adam Bader is a young lawyer who as a Public Defender is assigned to defend a young man accused of murder

suspect_architecture.value: Single primary suspect (Pearl) with twin brother (Tyrone Lofton) as key element - DNA evidence places defendant at scene with eyewitnesses, but identical twin creates reasonable doubt
suspect_architecture.quote: Chapter Four....Tyrone Lofton Chapter Five.....Thaddeus Lofton

red_herring.value: Twin brother impersonation - Pearl posing as his twin brother, deliberately concealed from defense attorney until trial conclusion
red_herring.quote: Someone else will have all the information about you posing as your twin brother

clue_fairness.value: DNA evidence and monozygotic twins information available through expert witness Dr. Kramer, though full twin impersonation withheld until end
clue_fairness.quote: I suggest that you question me on, DNA and Monozygotic or identical twins

social_world.value: Legal system hierarchy - Public Defender's office, prosecution, court system with plea bargaining and discovery rights structuring power dynamics
social_world.quote: At eight forty-five AM on a hot, July, Monday, Adam Bader st

alibi.value: False identity alibi - defendant's twin brother connection creates confusion about who was actually present at crime scene
alibi.quote: The Prosecutor for the State has eye witnesses that place the defendant at the crime scene

reveal_mechanic.value: DNA analysis of identical twins - expert testimony on monozygotic twins and DNA evidence limitations as technical demonstration method
reveal_mechanic.quote: At the same time there is evidence of the man's DNA on the victim

investigator_wound.value: Defense attorney's ethical crisis - discovers client's deception after achieving mistrial, leading to resignation from criminal law practice
investigator_wound.quote: I'm done. Walter can assign another lawyer to represent Pearl. Just as soon as I clean out my desk I'm resigning
